title: Nojiko Reveals Nami’s Past
scene: On pages 5–8, Nojiko’s account of the past reveals how Nami, Bellemere, and Cocoyasi Village were damaged by Arlong’s arrival. The flashback reaches Arlong’s arrival, his money demands, and Bellemere’s impossible choice.

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: This is bad! The pirates are headed to Belliemere's home!

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: even we barely managed to pay them off,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So how could she ever come up with enough money!? What do we do!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What is it Genzo!? And where are the children...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: They should be hiding in the forests but they're not there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: They must've took the back route to their home!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Oh no, we've gotta stop them!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: unfor- tunnely for you, I used to be a marine.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What's a pirate from the Grand Line,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Doing all the way out here,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Damn it! Why did things have to turn out this way!

summary: This part deepens Nami’s backstory, showing how family, money, and survival became tied to Arlong’s control over the village.
